ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company issuing the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "declared_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock, special) */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is payable */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarter, annual) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend record was created */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield at the time of declaration */,
  "dividend_payout_ratio" REAL /* Dividend payout ratio at the time of declaration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_types" (
  "dividend_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend type */,
  "dividend_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend type */,
  "dividend_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_frequencies" (
  "dividend_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend frequency */,
  "dividend_frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend frequency */,
  "dividend_frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_history" (
  "dividend_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend history record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company issuing the dividend */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dividend being paid */,
  "dividend_payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount_paid" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the company (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the company issuing the dividend
Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock, special)
Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarter, annual)
Date the dividend record was created
Dividend yield at the time of declaration
